features: Efficient and Easy to Use:The Resin Egg Timer simplifies the process of boiling eggs.With its clear density level indicators,you can achieve perfectly cooked eggs every time,whether you prefer them soft,medium,or hard-boiled

Durable and Long-Lasting:Made from robust resin,this egg timer is designed to withstand everyday use.Its sturdy construction ensures it remains a reliable tool in your kitchen essentials.Hand wash with warm soapy water to maintain its quality

Perfect for All Cooking Levels:Whether you're a novice or an experienced cook,this egg timer is an essential tool in your gadgets.Its easy-to-read density levels take the guesswork out of cooking, allowing you to enjoy consistently delicious eggs

Enhance Your Cooking Experience:Say goodbye to overcooked or undercooked eggs with the Egg Timer.This innovative cooking timer ensures precise timing and impeccable results,making it a must-have for anyone who loves boiled eggs

Compact and Stylish Design:The sleek and compact design of the Resin Egg Timer makes it a great addition to your kitchen decor.Measuring H 3.2 x L5.5 x W4cm and weighing only 0.06kg,it easily fits into your kitchen drawers
description: Product Description Specification Product Name:Egg Timer Material:Resin Colour:Red Dimension：2.17*1.5*1.26inch Package:pvc bag Add a splash of fun to your kitchen with our magic egg-shaped egg timer! This unique,multicolor gadget is designed to catch your eye and make cooking eggs an absolute delight No more guesswork this egg timer is incredibly easy to use! Just place it in your boiling water alongside the eggs,and watch the color-changing magic unfold,indicating the perfect cooking stage for your desired egg consistency The egg-shaped egg timer is not only reusable but also a responsible choice for the environment.Invest in a kitchen gadget that's built to last and leaves a minimal impact on our planet
